about_us_description_1: Nhiquela Serviços e Consultoria, LDA is a company specialized in the development of modern technological solutions for companies and organizations. Our focus is helping businesses grow through innovation, digitalization, and process automation.
about_us_description_2: We work with the development of intelligent systems, digital platforms, business management solutions, and technological consultancy, offering tools that increase operational efficiency and improve customer experience.
about_us_description_3: We believe that technology is one of the main drivers of growth for modern companies. Therefore, we develop scalable, secure solutions adapted to the needs of different types of businesses, including restaurants, hotels, clinics, service companies, and commerce in general.
about_us_description_4: Our team is committed to providing high-quality technology, continuous support, and innovative solutions that help companies operate more efficiently and competitively in the digital market.
about_us_objective: Our goal is to ensure that all customers receive fast, efficient, and professional assistance whenever needed.
about_us_spec_2: Management systems for restaurants and hotels
about_us_support_24_7: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
about_us_support_desc: We offer dedicated technical support to ensure the continuous operation of our solutions.
account_class_hint: Classes 1 to 3 are Balance Sheet accounts (Assets/Liabilities), while Classes 4 to 7 record Results (Costs/Revenue).
accounting_hub_desc: High-level financial, fiscal, and asset management.
admin_hub_desc: Configure the operational, visual, and security core of your unit

analytics_desc: We are building a 5-emotion sentiment analysis system.
